questions.question: If A = 5 and B = 10, and C = A + B × 2, what is the value of C?
If X = 20 and Y = 4, and Z = X ÷ Y + 5, what is the value of Z?
If P = 15 and Q = 3, and R = (P − Q) × 2, what is the value of R?
If M = 7 and N = 2, and O = M × N + 10, what is the value of O?
If G = 50 and H = 25, and I = G − H − 5, what is the value of I?
If D = 12 and E = 3, and F = D × (E + 2), what is the value of F?
If S = 100 and T = 2, and U = S ÷ (T × 5), what is the value of U?
If K = 9 and L = 9, and M = K + L − 8, what is the value of M?
If V = 8 and W = 2, and X = V × V ÷ W, what is the value of X?
If Y = 30 and Z = 10, and A = Y + Z ÷ 2, what is the value of A?
What is 17 MOD 3?
What is 25 MOD 4?
What is 10 MOD 10?
What is 53 MOD 5?
What is 100 MOD 7?
If X = 14, what is X MOD 2?
If Y = 21, what is Y MOD 4?
If Z = 9, what is (Z + 1) MOD 3?
What is 81 MOD 9?
What is 45 MOD 6?
IF 10 > 5 THEN Print "Yes" ELSE Print "No". What will be printed?
X = 8; IF X < 5 THEN Print "Low" ELSE Print "High". What will be printed?
A = 15; IF A MOD 2 == 0 THEN Print "Even" ELSE Print "Odd". What will be printed?
B = 20; IF B >= 20 THEN Print "Pass" ELSE Print "Fail". What will be printed?
C = 0; IF C > 0 THEN Print "+" ELSE Print "0". What will be printed?
D = 7; IF D * 2 == 14 THEN Print "True" ELSE Print "False". What will be printed?
E = 50; IF E / 2 > 30 THEN Print "A" ELSE Print "B". What will be printed?
F = 11; IF F < 10 THEN Print "Small" ELSE Print "Big". What will be printed?
G = 4; IF G * G == 16 THEN Print "Square" ELSE Print "None". What will be printed?
H = 100; IF H != 100 THEN Print "Diff" ELSE Print "Same". What will be printed?
IF (5 > 2) AND (10 < 20) THEN Print "Both" ELSE Print "One". What will be printed?
IF (3 == 3) OR (1 > 10) THEN Print "True" ELSE Print "False". What will be printed?
X = 5; IF (X > 0) AND (X < 10) THEN Print "In" ELSE Print "Out". What will be printed?
Y = 12; IF (Y < 10) OR (Y > 15) THEN Print "Yes" ELSE Print "No". What will be printed?
IF NOT (5 == 5) THEN Print "A" ELSE Print "B". What will be printed?
A = 7; IF (A > 5) AND (A MOD 2 != 0) THEN Print "Match" ELSE Print "Miss". What will be printed?
B = 2; IF (B == 1) OR (B == 2) THEN Print "Found" ELSE Print "Lost". What will be printed?
IF (10 / 2 == 5) AND (5 * 2 == 10) THEN Print "Correct" ELSE Print "Wrong". What will be printed?
X = 0; IF (X > -1) AND (X < 1) THEN Print "Zero" ELSE Print "Not". What will be printed?
IF (100 > 50) OR (50 > 100) THEN Print "Ok" ELSE Print "Error". What will be printed?
Sum = 0. FOR i from 1 to 3: Sum = Sum + i. What is the value of Sum?
X = 1. FOR i from 1 to 4: X = X * 2. What is the value of X?
Count = 0. FOR i from 1 to 5: Count = Count + 1. What is the value of Count?
A = 10. FOR i from 1 to 3: A = A - 2. What is the value of A?
Sum = 0. FOR i from 2 to 4: Sum = Sum + i. What is the value of Sum?
Y = 0. FOR i from 1 to 5: IF i MOD 2 == 0 THEN Y = Y + 1. What is the value of Y?
Z = 5. FOR i from 1 to 2: Z = Z * Z. What is the value of Z?
Total = 0. FOR i from 1 to 3: Total = Total + (i * 10). What is the value of Total?
B = 1. FOR i from 1 to 4: B = B + i. What is the value of B?
S = "". FOR i from 1 to 3: S = S + "A". What is the value of S?
X = 5. WHILE X > 0: X = X - 1. What is the final value of X?
Y = 1. WHILE Y < 10: Y = Y * 3. What is the final value of Y?
A = 10, B = 0. WHILE A > 8: A = A - 1, B = B + 1. What is the value of B?
C = 2. WHILE C < 10: C = C + 5. What is the final value of C?
D = 20. WHILE D > 5: D = D / 2. What is the final value of D?
E = 0. WHILE E < 3: E = E + 1. How many iterations will the loop run?
F = 1. WHILE F < 5: F = F + F. What is the final value of F?
G = 10. WHILE G != 8: G = G - 1. What is the final value of G?
H = 1. WHILE H * H < 10: H = H + 1. What is the final value of H?
I = 15. WHILE I > 0: I = I - 6. What is the final value of I?
X = 10. IF X > 5: IF X < 15: Print "Mid" ELSE: Print "High" ELSE: Print "Low". What will be printed?
A = 5, B = 10. IF A < B: IF A > 0: Print "Pos" ELSE: Print "Neg". What will be printed?
M = 20. IF M MOD 2 == 0: IF M MOD 5 == 0: Print "Both" ELSE: Print "Two". What will be printed?
N = 4. IF N > 1: IF N > 5: Print "A" ELSE: Print "B". What will be printed?
X = 7. IF X < 10: IF X == 7: Print "Seven" ELSE: Print "Other". What will be printed?
P = 50. IF P > 40: IF P < 45: Print "Small" ELSE: Print "Large". What will be printed?
Q = 0. IF Q >= 0: IF Q == 0: Print "Zero" ELSE: Print "Positive". What will be printed?
R = 8. IF R > 5: IF R * 2 == 16: Print "Match". What will be printed?
S = 12. IF S < 10: Print "No" ELSE: IF S < 20: Print "Yes". What will be printed?
T = 10. IF T != 5: IF T == 10: Print "Ten". What will be printed?
Arr = [10, 20, 30]. What is printed by Print Arr[1]?
List = [5, 2, 9]. List[0] = List[2]. What is printed by Print List[0]?
B = [10, 10, 10]. B[1] = 5. What is printed by Print B[0] + B[1]?

D = [8, 4, 2]. D[2] = D[2] * 10. What is printed by Print D[2]?

Count = 0. FOR i from 1 to 2: FOR j from 1 to 2: Count = Count + 1. What is the final value of Count?
X = 0. FOR i from 1 to 3: FOR j from 1 to i: X = X + 1. What is the final value of X?
FOR i from 1 to 2: FOR j from 1 to 3: Print "". How many "" will be printed?
Sum = 0. FOR i from 1 to 2: FOR j from 1 to 2: Sum = Sum + (i * j). What is the final value of Sum?

FOR i from 1 to 3: FOR j from 1 to 2: Print i. What is the last number printed?
B = 1. FOR i from 1 to 2: FOR j from 1 to 3: B = B + 1. What is the final value of B?

Count = 0. FOR i from 1 to 3: FOR j from 1 to 3: IF j > i THEN Count = Count + 1. What is the final value of Count?
Y = 10. FOR i from 1 to 2: FOR j from 1 to 2: Y = Y - 1. What is the final value of Y?

Function Mystery(x, y): IF x > y THEN Return x ELSE Return y. What is Mystery(10, 20)?
